prestazioni: Engine: 5.0L V10 (engine code: AXA) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by Wagner Tuning, and a TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate to manage boost at 1.5 bar (21.7 psi). Supporting mods include a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a custom ECU tune via APR Stage 4+ software with flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible).

Drivetrain: Reinforced 6-speed ZF 6HP28A automatic transmission with a Peloquin LSD differential, upgraded with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch kit (for manual swap builds) and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5" aluminum with CV joints). Rear subframe reinforcement via 034 Motorsport billet aluminum mounts to handle increased torque.

Suspension & Handling: KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom-valved for the Phaeton’s 2,300kg weight, paired with H&R 30mm front and 25mm rear anti-roll bars. Chassis stiffening via 034 Motorsport X-Brace and a custom strut tower bar by Autotech. Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Phaeton-specific, not a rebadge) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 10.5" and 11.5" wide wheels front/rear. Custom matte vinyl wrap in Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold with 3M Scotchcal gloss black accents on the grille, window trim, and badges.

Wheels & Tires: HRE FF01 20x10.5" (ET30) front and 20x11.5" (ET25) rear in brushed titanium finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear). Custom center caps with VW Motorsport logo and gold hardware.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs) with custom Alcantara/leather upholstery by Status Racing, featuring V10-specific embroidery ("AXA" on headrests). MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, custom gauge cluster by Defi (oil temp, boost, fuel pressure), and a full roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in with harness bar).
